title: Dubai seeks normalcy at all cost after a month of war
subhead: Due to its economic importance and its proximity to Israel, the United Arab Emirates has become a target for Iran. Yet in the wealthy city-state, it is not so much missiles, but the economic threat that worries the population.

title: Israel turns its back on France as Paris struggles to maintain dialogue

Palestinians voice anxiety and anger over Israeli law introducing death penalty
subhead: The law introducing the death penalty for Palestinians accused of deadly anti-Israeli attacks, condemned by Palestinian authorities and human rights organizations, has sparked a strong backlash. A call for a general strike was issued on Wednesday in East Jerusalem and the West Bank.

title: Pesticides and cancer: For the first time, researchers find a connection at the national level
subhead: French researchers have developed a model to map pesticide exposure across Peru to reported cancer clusters. They demonstrate a 'robust spatial association' between these chemicals and increased cancer incidence rates in over 400 areas.

title: 'The Drama': A marriage tested by unsettling truths
subhead: Zendaya, radiating vulnerability, and Robert Pattinson, perpetually awkward, deliver an endearing portrayal of a couple whose relationship is about to be shattered by unexpected revelations.

title: Mystery among the gorillas: Who killed Dian Fossey?
subhead: More than 40 years after the murder of the primatologist at her camp in Rwanda, the existence of a piece of evidence, possibly kept in a laboratory of the French police, could revive the investigation.

subhead: Mexican chipotle, Korean kimchi, Tunisian harissa: Whether mild or fiery, these condiments add zest to dishes from around the world. Here are five addresses in Paris and Montreuil to awaken your taste buds.

title: Céline Dion picks Paris for her return to the stage after a six-year hiatus
subhead: After several days of hints, the Canadian star waited for her birthday to announce her first concert dates since 2020: She will be in residence for 10 nights at Paris La Défense Arena, between September 12 and October 14.

title: Joël Soudron, one of France's most notorious drug traffickers, is arrested in Panama
subhead: Soudron was the subject of an Interpol Red Notice and two arrest warrants. He had been sought by the French National Fugitive Search Brigade since his escape in 2018.
